assertions.description: CAN transceiver SN65HVD230 (U6) not detected as a bus transceiver subcircuit - should identify CAN-TX/CAN-RX connections to ESP32 and CANH/CANL bus lines
Ethernet magnetics (transformer/common-mode choke between PHY and RJ45 connector) not linked to Ethernet PHY in ethernet_interfaces
No crystal circuit detected despite ESP32-WROOM module likely having internal crystal; the 50MHz crystal for the LAN8710A PHY is also not identified
Relay driver circuits (Q1/Q2 driving REL1/REL2 with flyback diodes D1/D3) not identified as transistor switch circuits
USB-UART bridge (likely CH340 or similar) not identified as a subcircuit with its USB data lines
REVIEW: Ethernet RMII signals (GPIO19/TXD0, GPIO22/TXD1, etc.) misclassified as UART in bus_analysis instead of being recognized as Ethernet RMII bus signals
REVIEW: Only 1 power regulator detected (TPS62A02 for 3.3V) but board has additional regulators - the SY8089 buck converter and battery charger circuit are not identified
